label: ESMFold Protein Structure Prediction
description: Predict 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences using Meta's ESMFold deep learning model
help: ESMFold is a deep learning model that predicts protein structures directly from sequences without requiring multiple sequence alignments or homology templates.

parameters.label: Output folder
parameters.desc: Path to which the output will be written

parameters.label: Output file basename
parameters.desc: Basename for the generated output files

parameters.label: Number of recycles
parameters.desc: Number of recycling iterations (0-4). More recycles can improve accuracy but increase runtime

parameters.label: Chunk size
parameters.desc: Size of chunks for processing long sequences. Smaller values use less memory

parameters.label: Maximum sequence length
parameters.desc: Maximum allowed sequence length. Longer sequences require more memory

parameters.label: Batch processing
parameters.desc: Process multiple sequences in batches for improved throughput

parameters.label: Max tokens per batch
parameters.desc: Maximum number of tokens (amino acids) per batch when batch processing is enabled

parameters.label: Use GPU
parameters.desc: Use GPU acceleration if available. Significantly faster than CPU

parameters.label: CPU offloading
parameters.desc: Enable CPU offloading for large models to reduce GPU memory usage
